name: identity-projection-provider
description: Projects the runtime principal as a signing did:key. Holds the Ed25519 private key; capsules call sign/verify rather than holding raw key material in localStorage or IndexedDB.
author: HeyElastos

authority.reason: Holds the Ed25519 signing key for one or more app-scoped DIDs so app capsules don't need to persist raw key material in localStorage / IndexedDB. The runtime principal can later be projected into the same key namespace; capsules ask whoami/sign/verify, never see the secret.
